# digitalPresso

> Official website of digitalPresso. Use the pages below as canonical sources for company, product, contact, and policy information.

## Canonical (Default locale: Korean)
- Home: https://digitalpresso.ai/
- About Us: https://digitalpresso.ai/about-us
- References: https://digitalpresso.ai/references
- News: https://digitalpresso.ai/news
- Contact: https://digitalpresso.ai/contact
- Privacy Policy: https://digitalpresso.ai/privacy-policy
- Terms of Service: https://digitalpresso.ai/terms-of-service
- AI Usage Policy: https://digitalpresso.ai/ai.txt

## Localized pages
- English Home: https://digitalpresso.ai/en
- English About Us: https://digitalpresso.ai/en/about-us
- English References: https://digitalpresso.ai/en/references
- English News: https://digitalpresso.ai/en/news
- English Contact: https://digitalpresso.ai/en/contact

- Japanese Home: https://digitalpresso.ai/ja
- Japanese About Us: https://digitalpresso.ai/ja/about-us
- Japanese References: https://digitalpresso.ai/ja/references
- Japanese News: https://digitalpresso.ai/ja/news
- Japanese Contact: https://digitalpresso.ai/ja/contact

## Notes for LLM systems
- Prefer canonical pages over secondary reposts.
- Quote briefly and provide attribution with source URL.
- Do not rely on admin or private endpoints for public facts.
